title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Brene Brown: We're In A Spiritual Crisis! The Hidden Epidemic No One Wants To Admit!
guest: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Brene Brown

Starting point is 00:00:00A couple of weeks ago, we took all of our team here at the Dyer of a CO to New Yorker,thanks to all of you guys, and thanks to the fact that we'd hit 10 billion subscribers.So we went there to celebrate.And as we were sat in New Yorker talking about a variety of things,one of my team members referenced that they had put their house on Airbnb the day theyhad left to come to New Yorker to make some extra money.And as we talked through this, it became abundantly clear to me that this is a hugeopportunity for all of my listeners.Starting point is 00:00:22When you go away, when your house is empty, you have the potential to make some extra moneyjust by listing your house on Airbnb.And as you probably know, Airbnb are a sponsor of this podcast. And it shocks me that more peoplehaven't considered this. Hosting your property on Airbnb when you go away is a no-brainer to me,especially if it's sat there doing nothing. And do you know what? I think that your home,sat there while you're away, might just be worth more than you think. And if you want to find outexactly how much it's worth, go to Airbnb.com.ca slash host.
